case_title: PARK WINE CO INC VS J AND M RESTAURANTS DBA EMBARKO! et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT J AND M RESTAURANTS DBA EMBARKO!
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,210.50 FILED BY PARK WINE CO INC AS TO DEFENDANT J AND M RESTAURANTS DBA EMBARKO! 2ND ADDRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-1995 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARK WINE CO INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT J AND M RESTAURANTS DBA EMBARKO! $1,210.50 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,275.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO J & M RETAURANTS RETURNED MOVED, LEFT NO ADDRESS.
